member.name: M:GTA.ParticleEffectAsset.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary:
Creates a class used for loading
s than can be used to start
s from inside the Asset
member.param:
The name of the asset file which contains all the
s you are wanting to start
member.remarks: The files have the extension *.ypt in OpenIV, use the file name withouth the extension for the
